description_long: This is a small, single-story pharmacy building with a flat roof and a prominent green-and-white striped awning above the entrance. The facade features a large 'PHARMACY' sign in bold white letters, flanked by a white cross symbol, both of which are common indicators of a pharmacy. The storefront includes a glass entrance door and a large display window, allowing visibility into the interior. The building is surrounded by a paved sidewalk and a patch of green grass, with several stylized trees and bushes providing a welcoming atmosphere. The side and rear walls are plain, with additional windows and minimal architectural detailing. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on accessibility and clear identification as a healthcare facility.
description: A modern, single-story pharmacy with a green-and-white awning, bold signage, glass entrance, and surrounding landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pharmacy sign, cross symbol, striped awning, glass entrance door, and large display window.
description_view_1: Side view revealing a plain wall with a single window, a tree, and part of the sidewalk and grass area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two windows, a flat roof, and landscaping with trees and bushes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a utility box, two bushes, a tree, and a window, plus the paved area extending to the side.
attribute_storefront_signage: PHARMACY text with a white cross symbol
attribute_entrance_door: swinging glass door with a handle
